title: Infosys and Incora Announce Multi-Year AI Collaboration for Aerospace Supply Chain Operations
detailed_summary: Infosys and Incora announced a new strategic, multi-year collaboration to advance artificial intelligence across Incora's global supply chain operations. Infosys will use Infosys Topaz and the Infosys EdgeVerve AI Next Platform to support operations across more than 60 countries, integrate with Incora's existing multi-ERP landscape, and improve visibility, accuracy and responsiveness across core operational workflows. Infosys will lead the design and deployment of a non-intrusive AI platform intended to harmonize data and processes without disrupting day-to-day operations. No deal value or financial impact was disclosed.

important_text_spans.text: Infosys (NSE, BSE, NYSE: INFY), a global leader in next-generation digital services and consulting, and Incora, a leading provider of innovative supply chain solutions in the aerospace and defense industry, today announced a new strategic collaboration  to advance the use of artificial intelligence across Incora's global supply chain operations.

important_text_spans.section_heading: Incora and Infosys Collaborate to Advance AI-Enabled Supply Chain Operations
important_text_spans.reason: Supports the duration and operational scale of the alliance.

important_text_spans.text: As part of the alliance, Infosys will lead the design and deployment of a non-intrusive AI platform that harmonizes data and processes across Incora's systems without disrupting day-to-day operations.
important_text_spans.section_heading: Incora and Infosys Collaborate to Advance AI-Enabled Supply Chain Operations
